content:
🚀 This version ensures immersion through setting, expands critical engagement through writing prompts, refines POV mechanics with real-world actions, and locks in final XP economy changes.

📜 1. Dual Settings for Every Week: Real-World & Fictional Night Setting

📜 Each week will now have:
✔ A Real-World Daytime Setting: A concrete, physical location relevant to the theme.
✔ A Nighttime Dream/Fictional Setting: A literary or symbolic location from the week’s readings.

Example: Week 4 – Gothic Literature & the Subconscious
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 139 (chunk 139/555)
